steps.title: Similar figures: lengths scale by the same factor $k$
steps.content: Triangle TUV (perimeter 12) is similar to triangle XYZ (perimeter 36). Since perimeters scale by the same factor as side lengths: $$k = \frac{36}{12} = 3$$

steps.title: Scale the corresponding side
steps.content:
$$XY = TU \times k = 6 \times 3 = 18$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
